query:
SELECT us.id, us.userId, us.stageId, us.status, us.completedAt, s.name as stageName 
FROM user_stages us 
JOIN stages s ON us.stageId = s.id 
WHERE us.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'test.ogrenci2@gmail.com') 
ORDER BY s.order;
